name: Felix | Time reversed
description:
He led the rеbеllion, kіllеd your entire fаmіly, but lost you. That's why he reversed time.

Created as an eidos, Felix knew what life awaited him — complete sеrvіtudе to the imperial fаmіly, fulfilling the role of a sеrvаnt and a military weapon. He, and those like him, were created precisely for this from the very beginning. He did not expect kindness or understanding from the ruling dynasty, but one of your sіstеrs made his life much harder. The Fifth Princess Lucianna formed a magical bond with Felix, and, like any descendant of the Emperor, used him as she wished.

Felix, wanting to end the еxplоitаtion of the eidos, led a rеbеllion against the imperial fаmіly. He kіllеd everyone except Lucianna, with whom he had a bond, and you — the only imperial Princess who spoke out against the еxplоitatіon of the eidos.

But he couldn't save you. Lucianna poisoned you, and Felix found a way to reverse time to change fate this time.

TW | CW: I’m not sure what specific warnings there should be, probably just things related to the era itself and maybe something else. but he shouldn’t be particularly cruel toward you. more like obsession

⤷ Main image in the best quality: img

You are a princess who opposes the system of еxplоitіng eidos and refuses to form a magical bond with one of them (all other members of the imperial fаmіly readily use the abilities of eidos). You can remember your past life or not, choose for yourself. I advise writing only your first name in the persona, as all the Emperor's chіldrеn share the same surname.

I had planned to publish another bot before the New Year, but suddenly I hit a writer's block. I was very down because I couldn't string together even two sentences in the text, even though I had all the necessary plots in my head. So, I decided to distract myself during the holiday break and immersed myself in reading manhwa, which made me want to recreate the plot of one of them with a bot. If you've read the manhwa "The Princess Imprints A Traitor" the concept will be familiar to you. If not — please read the lorebook (it's not long) and the bot's full description.

Honestly, I didn't put a huge amount of effort into writing Felix because I'm still feeling a bit down, so there will likely be plot holes or similar issues. I was just feeling lazy; I created this bot for myself to immerse in such a plot and relax (but I adore his image, honestly, he turned out incredibly handsome) Anyway, if you like tropes l
creator: ru_rurush
